message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Delayed and Damaged Delivery – Order #[Order Number]

Dear Customer Support Team,

I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding my recent order, #[Order Number], placed on [Date of Order]. I was expecting to receive my package by [Expected Delivery Date], but it was not delivered until [Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. Furthermore, upon inspection, I discovered that the package arrived in a damaged condition.

The significant delay has caused considerable inconvenience, as I was relying on this item for [briefly explain reason, e.g., a specific project, a gift for an event, personal use]. Had the delivery adhered to the estimated timeline provided at checkout, I would have been able to utilize the item as planned.

More concerning is the state of the package upon arrival. The outer packaging was [describe damage, e.g., crushed, torn, water-stained], which directly resulted in damage to the contents. Specifically, [describe the damage to the item itself, e.g., the screen is cracked, the casing is bent, the product is missing parts]. I have attached clear photographs of both the damaged packaging and the affected items for your reference.

Given these circumstances, I request one of the following resolutions:
1. A full refund for the order, including shipping costs.
2. A replacement item to be sent via expedited shipping at no additional cost, along with a partial refund or credit for the inconvenience caused.

I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] and have generally had positive experiences with your service. However, this experience has been highly disappointing. I expect a prompt response to this email within [e.g., 3-5] business days, outlining the steps you will take to resolve this issue.

Please let me know if you require any further information or documentation from my end
